name: SimpleMerge

releases.author: mss051
releases.description:
# Release Notes for Simple Merge v1.0.1
This patch update brings quality of life improvements, resolving issues with note requirements and link formatting to make the plugin more flexible.

## Fixes & Improvements:

- Merge Notes without H1 Headings: Fixed the "None of the linked notes contain an H1 heading" error that prevented merging when utilizing unformatted text files. You are no longer forced to add H1 headings (# Heading) to every single note you want to merge. The plugin will now successfully merge notes that lack headings, simply generating standard wikilinks for them instead of internal heading anchors.
- Support for Embedded Links: Fixed a bug where using embedded links (![[Note]]) in your Index/Draft document would result in broken formatting after the merge. The plugin now properly extracts embedded links, merges their content, and neatly converts the embed into a clean, standard Table of Contents wikilink ([[Note]]) by stripping the ! prefix.
releases.name: Release 1.0.1

releases.author: mss051
releases.description:
#### Release 1.0.0 - Initial Release

This is the first official release of SimpleMerge. The plugin allows the compilation of multiple linked notes into a single cohesive document, optimizing the workflow for long-form writing.

#### Key Features
* **Full Document Merge**: compiles an entire index note containing links into a single document.
* **Partial Merge**: merges only the specific links present within a text selection.
* **Live Sync Mode**: updates previously merged documents automatically when the original source notes or index files are modified.
* **Custom Separators**: provides the ability to separate merged notes using predefined options like empty spaces and page breaks, or custom Markdown/HTML inputs.

#### Installation
* Download the **main.js** and **manifest.json** files attached to this release.
* Place both files inside a new folder named `simple-merge` within the `.obsidian/plugins/` directory of your vault.
* Reload the plugins list in Obsidian and enable SimpleMerge.
releases.name: Release 1.0.0
